name: Konnektaro
narrative: Joined Konnektaro as Frontend Engineer to build a mobile-first progressive web app connecting learners and instructors through live sessions, asynchronous content, and a real-time networking graph.

Delivered the complete client from scratch: React + Next.js + TypeScript on the frontend, Express/Node.js API, Firebase for auth and hosting, MongoDB for persistence. Integrated OpenAI Whisper for live transcript generation. Shipped CI/CD on Firebase from day one.

name: Fleet Manager
narrative: At iomoto (ZF Group) I took a fleet management platform from early conception through to public beta — a white-label SaaS securing real-time telemetry access for more than 5 000 vehicles across enterprise clients.

Led the frontend from scratch: React, strict WCAG-compliant component library, Azure AD SSO, Jest + Cypress for full test coverage. The white-label architecture let fleet operators customise branding without forking the codebase.

artifacts.title: Architecture (draw.io)
artifacts.description: Architecture of the Fleet Manager app.

name: Tenant RES
narrative: Side project: a multi-tenant SaaS letting landlords manage properties, tenancies, maintenance issues, and rent ledgers — while tenants have a self-service portal for documents and requests.

Designed the full data model (ERD), REST API surface (OpenAPI spec), and auth layer (Firebase token verification with scoped roles) before writing a single line of product UI. The Figma flows cover landlord and tenant journeys end-to-end.

name: This Portfolio
narrative: Built to be its own exhibit: a Vite + React + TypeScript SPA deployed to Firebase Hosting, styled with Tailwind v4 CSS-first tokens, and backed by Sanity CMS so content is editable without a redeploy.

The Schematic visual direction — drafting-sheet white, Archivo Expanded headings, Sometype Mono data labels, hairline rules — treats the UI itself as an engineering artefact. Architecture diagram below.
